# 101 Formulaic Alphas (Kakushadze 2016, arXiv:1601.00991) transcribed into the
# atx-engine alpha DSL, one alpha per line.
#
# Format: `<id>: <dsl-expression>`. Lines beginning with `# ` are comments.
#
# DSL rules applied during transcription:
#  * Comparisons (< > <= >= == != && || !) yield a Mask dtype and CANNOT feed
#    arithmetic. Every numeric use of a bare condition `(P)` from the paper is
#    rewritten as a ternary: `(P) -> (P ? 1 : 0)`, `(P)*-1 -> (P ? -1 : 0)`,
#    `(P)*z -> (P ? z : 0)`. A comparison used directly as a ternary condition
#    is left as-is. Nested comparisons are wrapped to a 0/1 numeric first.
#  * scale(x) (paper, arity 1) -> scale(x, 1) (DSL scale is arity 2; 1 = unit L1).
#  * sum(x,d) -> ts_sum(x,d); SignedPower -> signedpower; IndNeutralize ->
#    indneutralize; Ts_* -> ts_*; ^ is power (right-assoc).
#  * Non-integer paper windows are floored to integers (e.g. 7.89 -> 7).
#  * `returns`, `cap`, `vwap` used as raw fields. adv{d} used with the paper's d.
#
# adv windows referenced (materialize these): adv5 adv10 adv15 adv20 adv30 adv40
#   adv50 adv60 adv81 adv120 adv150 adv180.
1: (rank(ts_argmax(signedpower(((returns < 0) ? stddev(returns, 20) : close), 2), 5)) - 0.5)
2: (-1 * correlation(rank(delta(log(volume), 2)), rank((close - open) / open), 6))
3: (-1 * correlation(rank(open), rank(volume), 10))
4: (-1 * ts_rank(rank(low), 9))
5: (rank(open - (ts_sum(vwap, 10) / 10)) * (-1 * abs(rank(close - vwap))))
6: (-1 * correlation(open, volume, 10))
7: ((adv20 < volume) ? (-1 * ts_rank(abs(delta(close, 7)), 60) * sign(delta(close, 7))) : -1)
8: (-1 * rank((ts_sum(open, 5) * ts_sum(returns, 5)) - delay(ts_sum(open, 5) * ts_sum(returns, 5), 10)))
9: ((0 < ts_min(delta(close, 1), 5)) ? delta(close, 1) : ((ts_max(delta(close, 1), 5) < 0) ? delta(close, 1) : (-1 * delta(close, 1))))
10: rank(((0 < ts_min(delta(close, 1), 4)) ? delta(close, 1) : ((ts_max(delta(close, 1), 4) < 0) ? delta(close, 1) : (-1 * delta(close, 1)))))
11: ((rank(ts_max(vwap - close, 3)) + rank(ts_min(vwap - close, 3))) * rank(delta(volume, 3)))
12: (sign(delta(volume, 1)) * (-1 * delta(close, 1)))
13: (-1 * rank(covariance(rank(close), rank(volume), 5)))
14: ((-1 * rank(delta(returns, 3))) * correlation(open, volume, 10))
15: (-1 * ts_sum(rank(correlation(rank(high), rank(volume), 3)), 3))
16: (-1 * rank(covariance(rank(high), rank(volume), 5)))
17: (((-1 * rank(ts_rank(close, 10))) * rank(delta(delta(close, 1), 1))) * rank(ts_rank(volume / adv20, 5)))
18: (-1 * rank((stddev(abs(close - open), 5) + (close - open)) + correlation(close, open, 10)))
19: ((-1 * sign((close - delay(close, 7)) + delta(close, 7))) * (1 + rank(1 + ts_sum(returns, 250))))
20: (((-1 * rank(open - delay(high, 1))) * rank(open - delay(close, 1))) * rank(open - delay(low, 1)))
21: ((((ts_sum(close, 8) / 8) + stddev(close, 8)) < (ts_sum(close, 2) / 2)) ? -1 : (((ts_sum(close, 2) / 2) < ((ts_sum(close, 8) / 8) - stddev(close, 8))) ? 1 : (((1 < (volume / adv20)) || ((volume / adv20) == 1)) ? 1 : -1)))
22: (-1 * (delta(correlation(high, volume, 5), 5) * rank(stddev(close, 20))))
23: (((ts_sum(high, 20) / 20) < high) ? (-1 * delta(high, 2)) : 0)
24: ((((delta(ts_sum(close, 100) / 100, 100) / delay(close, 100)) < 0.05) || ((delta(ts_sum(close, 100) / 100, 100) / delay(close, 100)) == 0.05)) ? (-1 * (close - ts_min(close, 100))) : (-1 * delta(close, 3)))
25: rank((((-1 * returns) * adv20) * vwap) * (high - close))
26: (-1 * ts_max(correlation(ts_rank(volume, 5), ts_rank(high, 5), 5), 3))
27: ((0.5 < rank(ts_sum(correlation(rank(volume), rank(vwap), 6), 2) / 2)) ? -1 : 1)
28: scale(((correlation(adv20, low, 5) + ((high + low) / 2)) - close), 1)
29: (min(ts_min(rank(rank(scale(log(ts_sum(ts_min(rank(rank((-1 * rank(delta(close - 1, 5))))), 2), 1)), 1))), 5), 5) + ts_rank(delay(-1 * returns, 6), 5))
30: (((1.0 - rank((sign(close - delay(close, 1)) + sign(delay(close, 1) - delay(close, 2))) + sign(delay(close, 2) - delay(close, 3)))) * ts_sum(volume, 5)) / ts_sum(volume, 20))
31: ((rank(rank(rank(decay_linear((-1 * rank(rank(delta(close, 10)))), 10)))) + rank(-1 * delta(close, 3))) + sign(scale(correlation(adv20, low, 12), 1)))
32: (scale(((ts_sum(close, 7) / 7) - close), 1) + (20 * scale(correlation(vwap, delay(close, 5), 230), 1)))
33: rank(-1 * (1 - (open / close)))
34: rank(((1 - rank(stddev(returns, 2) / stddev(returns, 5))) + (1 - rank(delta(close, 1)))))
35: ((ts_rank(volume, 32) * (1 - ts_rank((close + high) - low, 16))) * (1 - ts_rank(returns, 32)))
36: ((((((2.21 * rank(correlation(close - open, delay(volume, 1), 15))) + (0.7 * rank(open - close))) + (0.73 * rank(ts_rank(delay(-1 * returns, 6), 5)))) + rank(abs(correlation(vwap, adv20, 6)))) + (0.6 * rank((((ts_sum(close, 200) / 200) - open) * (close - open))))))
37: (rank(correlation(delay(open - close, 1), close, 200)) + rank(open - close))
38: ((-1 * rank(ts_rank(close, 10))) * rank(close / open))
39: ((-1 * rank(delta(close, 7) * (1 - rank(decay_linear(volume / adv20, 9))))) * (1 + rank(ts_sum(returns, 250))))
40: ((-1 * rank(stddev(high, 10))) * correlation(high, volume, 10))
41: (power(high * low, 0.5) - vwap)
42: (rank(vwap - close) / rank(vwap + close))
43: (ts_rank(volume / adv20, 20) * ts_rank(-1 * delta(close, 7), 8))
44: (-1 * correlation(high, rank(volume), 5))
45: (-1 * ((rank(ts_sum(delay(close, 5), 20) / 20) * correlation(close, volume, 2)) * rank(correlation(ts_sum(close, 5), ts_sum(close, 20), 2))))
46: ((0.25 < (((delay(close, 20) - delay(close, 10)) / 10) - ((delay(close, 10) - close) / 10))) ? -1 : (((((delay(close, 20) - delay(close, 10)) / 10) - ((delay(close, 10) - close) / 10)) < 0) ? 1 : (-1 * (close - delay(close, 1)))))
47: (((rank(1 / close) * volume) / adv20) * ((high * rank(high - close)) / (ts_sum(high, 5) / 5))) - rank(vwap - delay(vwap, 5))
48: (indneutralize(((correlation(delta(close, 1), delta(delay(close, 1), 1), 250) * delta(close, 1)) / close), IndClass.subindustry) / ts_sum(power(delta(close, 1) / delay(close, 1), 2), 250))
49: (((((delay(close, 20) - delay(close, 10)) / 10) - ((delay(close, 10) - close) / 10)) < (-1 * 0.1)) ? 1 : (-1 * (close - delay(close, 1))))
50: (-1 * ts_max(rank(correlation(rank(volume), rank(vwap), 5)), 5))
51: (((((delay(close, 20) - delay(close, 10)) / 10) - ((delay(close, 10) - close) / 10)) < (-1 * 0.05)) ? 1 : (-1 * (close - delay(close, 1))))
52: ((((-1 * ts_min(low, 5)) + delay(ts_min(low, 5), 5)) * rank(((ts_sum(returns, 240) - ts_sum(returns, 20)) / 220))) * ts_rank(volume, 5))
53: (-1 * delta((((close - low) - (high - close)) / (close - low)), 9))
54: ((-1 * ((low - close) * power(open, 5))) / ((low - high) * power(close, 5)))
55: (-1 * correlation(rank((close - ts_min(low, 12)) / (ts_max(high, 12) - ts_min(low, 12))), rank(volume), 6))
56: (0 - (1 * (rank(ts_sum(returns, 10) / ts_sum(ts_sum(returns, 2), 3)) * rank(returns * cap))))
57: (0 - (1 * ((close - vwap) / decay_linear(rank(ts_argmax(close, 30)), 2))))
58: (-1 * ts_rank(decay_linear(correlation(indneutralize(vwap, IndClass.sector), volume, 3), 7), 5))
59: (-1 * ts_rank(decay_linear(correlation(indneutralize(((vwap * 0.728317) + (vwap * 0.271683)), IndClass.industry), volume, 4), 16), 8))
60: (0 - (1 * ((2 * scale(rank((((close - low) - (high - close)) / (high - low)) * volume), 1)) - scale(rank(ts_argmax(close, 10)), 1))))
61: ((rank(vwap - ts_min(vwap, 16)) < rank(correlation(vwap, adv180, 18))) ? 1 : 0)
62: ((rank(correlation(vwap, ts_sum(adv20, 22), 10)) < rank((rank(open) + rank(open)) < (rank((high + low) / 2) + rank(high)) ? 1 : 0)) ? -1 : 0)
63: (-1 * (rank(decay_linear(delta(indneutralize(close, IndClass.industry), 2), 8)) - rank(decay_linear(correlation(((vwap * 0.318108) + (open * 0.681892)), ts_sum(adv180, 37), 14), 12))))
64: ((rank(correlation(ts_sum(((open * 0.178404) + (low * 0.821596)), 13), ts_sum(adv120, 13), 17)) < rank(delta(((((high + low) / 2) * 0.178404) + (vwap * 0.821596)), 4))) ? -1 : 0)
65: ((rank(correlation(((open * 0.00817205) + (vwap * 0.99182795)), ts_sum(adv60, 9), 6)) < rank(open - ts_min(open, 14))) ? -1 : 0)
66: (-1 * (rank(decay_linear(delta(vwap, 4), 7)) + ts_rank(decay_linear(((((low * 0.96633) + (low * 0.03367)) - vwap) / (open - ((high + low) / 2))), 11), 7)))
67: (-1 * power(rank(high - ts_min(high, 2)), rank(correlation(indneutralize(vwap, IndClass.sector), indneutralize(adv20, IndClass.subindustry), 6))))
68: ((ts_rank(correlation(rank(high), rank(adv15), 9), 14) < rank(delta(((close * 0.518371) + (low * 0.481629)), 1))) ? -1 : 0)
69: (-1 * power(rank(ts_max(delta(indneutralize(vwap, IndClass.industry), 3), 5)), ts_rank(correlation(((close * 0.490655) + (vwap * 0.509345)), adv20, 5), 9)))
70: (-1 * power(rank(delta(vwap, 1)), ts_rank(correlation(indneutralize(close, IndClass.industry), adv50, 18), 18)))
71: max(ts_rank(decay_linear(correlation(ts_rank(close, 3), ts_rank(adv180, 12), 18), 4), 16), ts_rank(decay_linear(power(rank(((low + open) - (vwap + vwap))), 2), 16), 4))
72: (rank(decay_linear(correlation(((high + low) / 2), adv40, 9), 10)) / rank(decay_linear(correlation(ts_rank(vwap, 4), ts_rank(volume, 19), 7), 3)))
73: (-1 * max(rank(decay_linear(delta(vwap, 5), 3)), ts_rank(decay_linear(((delta(((open * 0.147155) + (low * 0.852845)), 2) / ((open * 0.147155) + (low * 0.852845))) * -1), 3), 17)))
74: ((rank(correlation(close, ts_sum(adv30, 37), 15)) < rank(correlation(rank(((high * 0.0261661) + (vwap * 0.9738339))), rank(volume), 11))) ? -1 : 0)
75: ((rank(correlation(vwap, volume, 4)) < rank(correlation(rank(low), rank(adv50), 12))) ? 1 : 0)
76: (-1 * max(rank(decay_linear(delta(vwap, 1), 12)), ts_rank(decay_linear(ts_rank(correlation(low, adv81, 8), 20), 17), 19)))
77: min(rank(decay_linear((((high + low) / 2) + high) - (vwap + high), 20)), rank(decay_linear(correlation(((high + low) / 2), adv40, 3), 6)))
78: power(rank(correlation(ts_sum(((low * 0.352233) + (vwap * 0.647767)), 20), ts_sum(adv40, 20), 7)), rank(correlation(rank(vwap), rank(volume), 6)))
79: ((rank(delta(indneutralize(((close * 0.60733) + (open * 0.39267)), IndClass.sector), 1)) < rank(correlation(ts_rank(vwap, 4), ts_rank(adv150, 9), 15))) ? 1 : 0)
80: (-1 * power(sign(rank(delta(indneutralize(((open * 0.868128) + (high * 0.131872)), IndClass.industry), 4))), ts_rank(correlation(high, adv10, 5), 6)))
81: ((rank(log(product(rank(power(rank(correlation(vwap, ts_sum(adv10, 50), 8)), 4)), 15))) < rank(correlation(rank(vwap), rank(volume), 5))) ? -1 : 0)
82: (-1 * min(rank(decay_linear(delta(open, 1), 15)), ts_rank(decay_linear(correlation(indneutralize(volume, IndClass.sector), open, 17), 7), 13)))
83: ((rank(delay(((high - low) / (ts_sum(close, 5) / 5)), 2)) * rank(rank(volume))) / (((high - low) / (ts_sum(close, 5) / 5)) / (vwap - close)))
84: signedpower(ts_rank((vwap - ts_max(vwap, 15)), 21), delta(close, 5))
85: power(rank(correlation(((high * 0.876703) + (close * 0.123297)), adv30, 10)), rank(correlation(ts_rank(((high + low) / 2), 4), ts_rank(volume, 10), 7)))
86: ((ts_rank(correlation(close, ts_sum(adv20, 15), 6), 20) < rank((open + close) - (vwap + open))) ? -1 : 0)
87: (-1 * max(rank(decay_linear(delta(((close * 0.369701) + (vwap * 0.630299)), 2), 3)), ts_rank(decay_linear(abs(correlation(adv81, close, 13)), 5), 14)))
88: min(rank(decay_linear(((rank(open) + rank(low)) - (rank(high) + rank(close))), 8)), ts_rank(decay_linear(correlation(ts_rank(close, 8), ts_rank(adv60, 21), 8), 7), 3))
89: (ts_rank(decay_linear(correlation((low * 1.0), adv10, 7), 6), 4) - ts_rank(decay_linear(delta(indneutralize(vwap, IndClass.industry), 3), 10), 15))
90: (-1 * power(rank(close - ts_max(close, 5)), ts_rank(correlation(indneutralize(adv40, IndClass.subindustry), low, 5), 3)))
91: (-1 * (ts_rank(decay_linear(decay_linear(correlation(indneutralize(close, IndClass.industry), volume, 10), 16), 4), 5) - rank(decay_linear(correlation(vwap, adv30, 4), 3))))
92: min(ts_rank(decay_linear((((((high + low) / 2) + close) < (low + open)) ? 1 : 0), 15), 19), ts_rank(decay_linear(correlation(rank(low), rank(adv30), 8), 7), 7))
93: (ts_rank(decay_linear(correlation(indneutralize(vwap, IndClass.industry), adv81, 17), 20), 8) / rank(decay_linear(delta(((close * 0.524434) + (vwap * 0.475566)), 3), 16)))
94: (-1 * power(rank(vwap - ts_min(vwap, 12)), ts_rank(correlation(ts_rank(vwap, 20), ts_rank(adv60, 4), 18), 3)))
95: ((rank(open - ts_min(open, 12)) < ts_rank(power(rank(correlation(ts_sum(((high + low) / 2), 19), ts_sum(adv40, 19), 13)), 5), 12)) ? 1 : 0)
96: (-1 * max(ts_rank(decay_linear(correlation(rank(vwap), rank(volume), 4), 4), 8), ts_rank(decay_linear(ts_argmax(correlation(ts_rank(close, 7), ts_rank(adv60, 4), 4), 13), 14), 13)))
97: (-1 * (rank(decay_linear(delta(indneutralize(((low * 0.721001) + (vwap * 0.278999)), IndClass.industry), 3), 20)) - ts_rank(decay_linear(ts_rank(correlation(ts_rank(low, 8), ts_rank(adv60, 17), 5), 19), 16), 7)))
98: (rank(decay_linear(correlation(vwap, ts_sum(adv5, 26), 5), 7)) - rank(decay_linear(ts_rank(ts_argmin(correlation(rank(open), rank(adv15), 21), 9), 7), 8)))
99: ((rank(correlation(ts_sum(((high + low) / 2), 20), ts_sum(adv60, 20), 9)) < rank(correlation(low, volume, 6))) ? -1 : 0)
100: (0 - (1 * (((1.5 * scale(indneutralize(indneutralize(rank(((((close - low) - (high - close)) / (high - low)) * volume)), IndClass.subindustry), IndClass.subindustry), 1)) - scale(indneutralize((correlation(close, rank(adv20), 5) - rank(ts_argmin(close, 30))), IndClass.subindustry), 1)) * (volume / adv20))))
101: ((close - open) / ((high - low) + 0.001))
